title: Selecting email notification setting at board levels, not account levels

posts.author: Tay (Taylor Hutchison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ability to turn off notifications for update comments on certain boards.

(e.g. the is a board I have created, but do not want alerts on as it is for other members of my team. I still need access to this board, however to turn off notifications for it, my only option is to turn off updates for all boards).
